toolInput:
{"file_path":"/home/runner/.claude/plans/piped-wiggling-nova.md","content":"# Plan: Fix Critical Auth Issues — Add hash/salt fields to Users collection

## Context

`AuthService.login()` in `src/auth/auth-service.ts:96–97` reads `hash` and `salt` fields that do not exist in the `Users` Payload collection. The existing `Users.ts` has `auth: true` (Payload built-in auth) but no explicit `hash`/`salt` fields. Any login attempt via `AuthService` throws `'Invalid credentials'` at the `!hash || !salt` guard even when credentials are correct.

The fix is to add explicit `hash` and `salt` text fields to `Users.ts` with `hidden: true`, `admin: { readOnly: true }`, and a `beforeChange` hook that hashes the password on create/update. A `hash-password.ts` utility is also needed to expose the PBKDF2 logic as a reusable function (the logic already exists inline in `auth-service.ts:45–60`).

---

## Files to create

### 1. `src/utils/hash-password.ts`
PBKDF2-SHA256 utility matching the 2… [+3461 chars]

`AuthService.login()` in `src/auth/auth-service.ts:96–97` reads `hash` and `salt` fields that do not exist in the `Users` Payload collection. The existing `Users.ts` has `auth: true` (Payload built-in auth) but no explicit `hash`/`salt` fields. Any login attempt via `AuthService` throws `'Invalid credentials'` at the `!hash || !salt` guard even when credentials are correct.

The fix is to add explicit `hash` and `salt` text fields to `Users.ts` with `hidden: true`, `admin: { readOnly: true }`, and a `beforeChange` hook that hashes the password on create/update. A `hash-password.ts` utility is also needed to expose the PBKDF2 logic as a reusable function (the logic already exists inline in `auth-service.ts:45–60`).
